case_title: KING SUN WON VS. XIAG QIN ZHU et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-23-2002 CONTINUED TO NOV-18-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
